channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Trump and Hegseth invoke God and religion in Iran war press conference
item.description: Trump believes God backs US in Iran war, Hegseth compares airman's rescue to Jesus' resurrection

item.title: Iran releases on bail Japan national jailed amid antigovernment protests
item.description: The person released is believed to be Japanese broadcaster NHK's Tehran bureau chief, Shinnosuke Kawashima.

item.title: Synagogue in Tehran ‘completely destroyed’ in US-Israeli attack
item.description: US-Israeli strikes destroy synagogue in Tehran, prompting outrage amid reports of 15 killed across Iran overnight.

item.title: Lebanese firefighters respond to aftermath of Israeli strike
item.description: Video shows Lebanese firefighters trying to put out flames in the southern city of Maarakeh.

item.title: What is driving the Houthis’ decision-making on joining the Iran war
item.description: There are two currents within the Houthis: one favouring caution, and another favouring commitment to allies.

item.title: How Pakistan’s solar boom is shielding it from worst of Iran war crisis
item.description: A quarter of Pakistani households are now using solar panels. This insulates millions of families from the energy crisis

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 39 of US-Israeli attacks?
item.description: Trump has issued a strict deadline, but a defiant Iran says the threats by the US president are 'delusional'.

item.title: Israel threatens Iran’s trains, railways before Trump’s deadline expires
item.description: The bridge linking Saudi Arabia and Bahrain has been briefly closed as Trump threatens to hit Iranian infrastructure.

item.title: Iran says US-Israeli projectile has struck a synagogue in Tehran
item.description: A US-Israeli strike has caused extensive damage to a synagogue in Tehran, according to a video by Mehr News.

item.title: Trump’s threat to strike Iran’s power plants looms
item.description: US President Donald Trump said ‘Tuesday will be power plant day’ in a vulgar post on social media.
